name: Jiffy Rolls ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Add the ingredients in order to a breadmaker.
3. Select "white bread, manual" and press Start.
4. When the machine beeps at the end of the second knead cycle, remove the dough.
5. If desired, refrigerate the mixture overnight for use the next day.
6. Place the dough into pans in any desired shape.
7. Let the dough rise again.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes for clover leaf rolls, or 30 minutes for rolls shaped like a circle in a pan.
